creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Ok. Happy thing, if there's some additional tooling for the update lol. 

If it could help with any load-shedding, so to speak, I could try take to a look at the freebsd-eclipse sources then to adapt the patch, minus the interim parts. If working this out from an archived cloud image, that could serve to alleviate the limitations on network bandwidth here, for sending the patches on the GitHub side. I suppose there would be two pull requests to forward, in such hypothetical eventuality.

I'm in a finals week with some courses right now. I may able to spin up a cloud image over the weekend though. I could work on those pull requests, once a build host is up and running on the cloud side.

HTH. Health
